scripts.test:authenticated: npm run test:auth && cross-env E2E_AUTH_REQUIRED=1 E2E_AUTH_FILE=storageState/auth.json playwright test tests/authenticated-session.spec.js tests/responsive-mobile.spec.js
scripts.test:auth-smoke: npm run test:auth && cross-env E2E_AUTH_REQUIRED=1 E2E_AUTH_FILE=storageState/auth.json playwright test tests/authenticated-session.spec.js
scripts.check:e2e: npm run guard:gitignore && npm run guard:hygiene && npm run test:public
